ddt:Target.Name: AJ0_X91_PSP2-PS_6A-2x_V2
ddt:Target.Description:
Calculateur de BVA
Version Soft : 6A-23, 6A-24 & 6A-25 (Diag On Can) Véhicule : X91
Juillet 2007
Auteur : VICAIGNE (70790) avicaigne@webmail.alten.fr

Data.Name: Low and reverse brake pressure switch
Engine speed
Data.Comment: Engine speed received on the CAN from ECM

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
Low and reverse brake pressure switch
Lock-up and low and reverse brake linear solenoid
Low and reverse brake shift solenoid
CAN mean effective torque information invalid
CAN engine torque without GB request information invalid

Data.Name: Brake switch - CAN
Data.Comment: Etat de la pédale de frein - CAN

Data.Name: Brake switch - wire
Data.Comment: Etat de la pédale de frein - filaire

Data.Name: Electrovalve A current command
Data.Comment: Commande en courant de l'électrovanne A (Low clutch)

Data.Name: Electrovalve B current command
Data.Comment: Commande en courant de l'électrovanne B (3-5 Reverse clutch)

Data.Name: Electrovalve C current command
Data.Comment: Commande en courant de l'électrovanne C (High clutch)

Data.Name: Electrovalve D current command
Data.Comment: Commande en courant de l'électrovanne D (Lock-up & low and reverse brake)

Data.Name: Electrovalve E current command
Data.Comment: Commande en courant de l'électrovanne E (2-6 brake)

Data.Name: Line pressure electrovalve current command
Data.Comment: Commande en courant de l'électrovanne de pression de ligne

Data.Name: Lock-up electrovalve current command
Data.Comment: Commande en courant de l'électrovanne lock-up

Data.Name: Electrovalve A activation switch
Data.Comment: Switch d'activation de l'électrovanne A (Low clutch)

Data.Name: Electrovalve B activation switch
Data.Comment: Switch d'activation de l'électrovanne B (3-5 Reverse clutch)

Data.Name: Electrovalve C activation switch
Data.Comment: Switch d'activation de l'électrovanne C (High clutch)

Data.Name: Electrovalve D activation switch
Data.Comment: Switch d'activation de l'électrovanne D (Lock-up & low and reverse brake)

Data.Name: Electrovalve E activation switch
Data.Comment: Switch d'activation de l'électrovanne E (2-6 brake)

Data.Name: Selected shifting law program
Data.Comment: Programme de loi de passage choisi

Data.Name: Dynamic correction of shifting laws
Data.Comment: Correction dynamique des lois de passage

Data.Name: Gear setpoint of ASC
Data.Comment: Rapport demandé par les corrections dynamiques

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: AT torque control type
Data.Comment: Type du dialogue en couple entre BVA et ECM

Data.Name: Shift electrovalve state B
Data.Comment: Commande de l'électrovanne (on/off) B (Low and reverse brake)

Request.Name: ECUReset
Request.Comment: ECUReset

Request.Name: All output solenoids control
Request.Comment: This request enables to control all solenoids at the same time, during 6 sec

DataItem.Name: Low and reverse brake pressure switch

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: DataRead.Engine coolant temperature
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Température du liquide de refroidissement

Request.Name: DataRead.Estimated effective engine torque
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Couple moteur effectif estimé

Request.Name: DataRead.Brake switch - CAN
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Etat de la pédale de frein - CAN

Request.Name: DataRead.Brake switch - wire
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Etat de la pédale de frein - filaire

Request.Name: DataRead.Oil temperature - gearbox
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Température d'huile - boîte

Request.Name: DataRead.Oil temperature sensor voltage - gearbox
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Tension capteur température d'huile - boîte

Request.Name: DataRead.Targetted gear engaged
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Rapport engagé demandé

Request.Name: DataRead.Current gear engaged
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Rapport engagé courant

Request.Name: DataRead.Gear lever position
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Position du levier de vitesse

Request.Name: DataRead.Gearbox speed
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Régime primaire

Request.Name: DataRead.Electrovalve A current command
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Commande en courant de l'électrovanne A

Request.Name: DataRead.Electrovalve B current command
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Commande en courant de l'électrovanne B

Request.Name: DataRead.Electrovalve C current command
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Commande en courant de l'électrovanne C

Request.Name: DataRead.Electrovalve D current command
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Commande en courant de l'électrovanne D

Request.Name: DataRead.Electrovalve E current command
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Commande en courant de l'électrovanne E

Request.Name: DataRead.Line pressure electrovalve current command
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Commande en courant de l'électrovanne de pression de ligne

Request.Name: DataRead.Lock-up electrovalve current command
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Commande en courant de l'électrovanne lock-up

Request.Name: DataRead.Engine speed - CAN
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Régime moteur - CAN

Request.Name: DataRead.Vehicle speed - wire
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Vitesse véhicule - filaire

Request.Name: DataRead.Slow torque setpoint
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Consigne couple lent

Request.Name: DataRead.Fast torque setpoint
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Consigne couple rapide

Request.Name: DataRead.Ergonomic pedal
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Pédale ergonomique

Request.Name: DataRead.Manuel mode - state
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Etat de l'impulsion manuelle -

Request.Name: DataRead.Manuel mode + state
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Etat de l'impulsion manuelle +

Request.Name: DataRead.Electrovalve A activation switch
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Switch d'activation de l'électrovanne A

Request.Name: DataRead.Electrovalve B activation switch
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Switch d'activation de l'électrovanne B

Request.Name: DataRead.Electrovalve C activation switch
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Switch d'activation de l'électrovanne C

Request.Name: DataRead.Electrovalve D activation switch
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Switch d'activation de l'électrovanne D

Request.Name: DataRead.Electrovalve E activation switch
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Switch d'activation de l'électrovanne E

Request.Name: DataRead.Selected shifting law program
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Programme de loi de passage choisi

Request.Name: DataRead.Dynamic correction of shifting laws
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Correction dynamique des lois de passage

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: DataRead.Battery voltage
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Tension batterie

Request.Name: DataRead.Torque converter state
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Etat du convertiseur

Request.Name: DataRead.Kick hard information
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Etat du point dur

Request.Name: DataRead.Gear setpoint of ASC
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Rapport demandé par les corrections dynamiques

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: DataRead.Gearbox oil pressure
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Pression d'huile boîte

Request.Name: DataRead.AT torque control type
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Changement de rapport

Request.Name: DataRead.History.Reprog.Current
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier

Request.Name: DataRead.Shift electrovalve state A
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Commande de l'électrovanne (on/off) A (Low clutch)

Request.Name: DataRead.Shift electrovalve state B
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Commande de l'électrovanne (on/off) B (Low and reverse brake)

Request.Name: DataRead.engine torque without GB request
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Couple moteur hors transmission automatique

Device.Name: Low and reverse brake pressure switch
Lock-up and low and reverse brake linear solenoid
Low and reverse brake shift solenoid

DeviceData.Name: Low and reverse brake pressure switch

Device.Name: Read date of last after-sales operation

Label.Text: Before pressing the button, select an item in each of the 2 pull-down menus above.

Display.DataName: Low and reverse brake pressure switch
